Dubai Integrated Economic Zones Authority (DIEZ) records its highest-ever performance in 2025, with non-oil trade reaching AED491 billion. The figure represents a 46% increase compared to 2024, raising DIEZ’s contribution to Dubai’s non-oil trade to 16%, while the value of trade has quadrupled since 2020. Total trade volume also grew by 50% to reach 667,800 tonnes in 2025.
